bio: Major General Gholam Ali Rashid was a senior [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) commander who served as commander of the [Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters](/orgs/khatam-al-anbiya-central-headquarters), the highest joint operational command of Iran's armed forces. He simultaneously held the position of deputy commander-in-chief of the Iranian armed forces. A veteran of the [Iran–Iraq War](/events/iran-iraq-war), Rashid participated in all major IRGC operations during that conflict. He held a master's degree in political geography from the [University of Tehran](/orgs/university-of-tehran) and a doctorate in political geography from Tarbiat Modares University. His political activism began in 1978 against the Pahlavi regime; he was imprisoned twice by [SAVAK](/orgs/savak) before the [1979 Islamic Revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979). Rashid was killed on 13 June 2025 in the [Israeli strikes on Iran](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-june-2025) that opened the Twelve-Day War. He was succeeded briefly by [Ali Shadmani](/people/ali-shadmani).

sources.title: Profile: Gholamali Rashid, Iran's Former War Commander
Israeli airstrikes eliminate senior Iranian military officials

editorial_notes: Killed 13 June 2025 in Operation Rising Lion Israeli strikes. Had commanded KCHQ since 2015. Born year 1953 from Wikipedia.
